SELECT exp(0.0) AS exp_zero, exp(1.0) AS exp_one FROM test_values WHERE value IN (0.0, 1.0);
SELECT value, exp(value) FROM test_values WHERE value BETWEEN -1.0 AND 2.0;
CREATE TABLE more_values (id INT, val FLOAT);
SELECT a.value, exp(a.value) AS exp_a, b.val, exp(b.val) AS exp_b FROM test_values a JOIN more_values b ON a.value < b.val;
WITH exp_results AS (SELECT value, exp(value) AS exp_value FROM test_values) SELECT AVG(exp_value) FROM exp_results WHERE exp_value > 1;
SELECT SUM(exp(value) * 10) AS weighted_exp FROM test_values WHERE value > 0;
